title: campanula rotundifolia var. pusilla
intro: Campanula rotundifolia var. pusilla, also known as small bluebell, is a variety of the bluebell plant that belongs to the bellflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dyspepsia, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Campanula rotundifolia var. pusilla include its ability to reduce inflammation, calm digestive problems, and act as an antiseptic. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
